era_resolution: Quarantine and isolation measures were implemented, but the lack of medical knowledge and technology hindered effective treatment and prevention.
modern_resolution: Implementation of advanced nanotechnology and artificial intelligence to develop targeted treatments, enhance healthcare infrastructure, and establish robust global health monitoring systems.

biblical_tie.context: Do not be afraid of those who kill the body but cannot kill the soul.

protocol: UESP Nanites Stabilization Protocol: Immediate activation of AI-assisted health surveillance, strategic allocation of nanotech resources, and collaborative international efforts to mitigate risks and promote global health security.
